jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at NHPC
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
